name: OpenGravity
desc: A lightweight, vanilla JS, open source BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) clone of the Google Antigravity UI. It currently features a live xterm.js terminal with direct…
descFull: A lightweight, vanilla JS, open source BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) clone of the Google Antigravity UI. It currently features a live xterm.js terminal with direct local file system sync and a sidebar agent capable of running commands and editing files. Built in pure HTML/CSS/JS for maximum speed and zero installation.

hnPosts.title: Show HN: OpenGravity – A zero-install, BYOK vanilla JS clone of Antigravity
